backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the CampusVoice backend with complaint CRUD operations and user profile management, enforcing role-based access control (admin vs. authenticated user) via a MixinAuthorization mixin and AccessControl module.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (role-based auth, complaint registration, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and contents of every frontend module.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes, including background, foreground, sidebar, chart, and semantic UI tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the TypeScript entry point via a module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages authentication state, profile setup flow, responsive sidebar layout, and view routing for all dashboard pages based on the user's campus role.
frontend/src/components/AIChatbot.tsx: Floating AI chatbot widget that maintains a conversation history, sends messages to the Gemini service, and supports text-to-speech playback for assistant responses.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Sticky top navigation header with logo, emergency alert dialog, notification dropdown, and user profile/logout menu, adapting display based on campus role.
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx: Role-aware sidebar navigation component that renders different nav items for student, staff, HOD, and admin roles, with a logout confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/ComplaintCard.ts: Card component displaying a single complaint's status, priority, category, media attachments, and student info, with optional status-update actions based on the viewer's role.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyAlertOv: Full-screen overlay that displays an active emergency alert with student/location details and plays a siren, visible only to HOD and admin roles until acknowledged.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackForm.tsx: Star-rating feedback form for resolved complaints that saves rating and comment to local metadata, with a read-only display mode for already-submitted feedback.
frontend/src/components/MediaUploader.ts: Media attachment component allowing users to upload photos, videos, and audio files, converting them to data URLs and displaying a preview grid with removal controls.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog component that collects and saves a new user's profile (name, email, campus role, department) using a form with validation before allowing access to the app.
frontend/src/constants/appRoles.ts: Defines the CampusRole type and lookup records for human-readable labels and Tailwind color classes for each campus role (student, staff, hod, admin).
frontend/src/constants/complaintCategori: Exports a comprehensive list of complaint categories grouped by domain, sensitive category flags, and a list of college departments used throughout the app.
frontend/src/contexts/AppContext.tsx: Provides a global React context that exposes the authenticated user's profile, campus role, notifications, and emergency alerts, polling local storage every 5 seconds for updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state to the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all TanStack Query hooks for backend interactions, including fetching/saving user profiles and CRUD operations on complaints with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Outfit fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a campus teal/navy color palette including light/dark themes, status badges, priority indicators, and sidebar variables.
frontend/src/lib/audioService.ts: Web Audio API service that provides functions to play a confirmation beep, an emergency siren (sawtooth whoops), and stop all audio by closing the shared AudioContext.
frontend/src/lib/complaintHelpers.ts: Utility functions for complaints including generating unique IDs, calculating deadlines based on priority, formatting timestamps and deadlines, and checking if a complaint is overdue.
frontend/src/lib/geminiService.ts: Service that wraps the Gemini 2.0 Flash API to analyze complaint text for category/priority/department, analyze facility images for visible issues, and provide a campus-context chatbot response.
frontend/src/lib/localComplaintStore.ts: localStorage layer that stores and manages extended complaint metadata (category, department, media, feedback), emergency alerts, and notifications that supplement the ICP backend's core complaint data.
frontend/src/lib/reportGenerator.ts: Utility that generates and triggers browser downloads of complaint reports in JSON or CSV format, including summary statistics and formatted complaint fields.
frontend/src/lib/userProfileHelpers.ts: Encodes and decodes extended user profile data (campus role, department) into/from the ICP backend's UserProfile name field using a pipe-delimited format.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyticsPage.tsx: Displays analytics charts (category, status, priority distributions) for complaints using Recharts, with role-based filtering, AI-powered predictive analysis via Gemini, and JSON export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ChatbotPage.tsx: Simple page wrapper for the AI chatbot feature that instructs users to open the floating chat widget in the bottom-right corner.
frontend/src/pages/ComplaintsListPage.ts: Lists all complaints with search, status/priority filtering, role-based visibility (admin/HOD/staff/student), status update actions, feedback forms, and CSV export.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Role-aware dashboard showing summary stat cards (total, pending, resolved, high-priority complaints) and quick-navigation buttons tailored to student, staff, HOD, or admin roles.
frontend/src/pages/EmergencyLogsPage.tsx: Admin page that displays, acknowledges, and clears emergency alert logs stored locally, with color-coded cards indicating acknowledged vs. unacknowledged alerts.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page with a hero section, Internet Identity login button, and a feature highlights grid introducing CampusVoice AI's core capabilities.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitComplaintPage.t: A form page for students to submit complaints with description, category, priority, anonymous toggle, and media uploads. Integrates Gemini AI for auto-categorization/analysis and saves complaint metadata locally after submission.
frontend/src/pages/TrackComplaintsPage.t: Displays a filterable, searchable list of the current user's submitted complaints with status badges, detail dialog, feedback form, and CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/UserManagementPage.ts: A placeholder admin page for user management that displays a static informational card explaining that users are authenticated via Internet Identity and managed on-chain.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom fonts (Inter/Outfit), extended color palettes (teal, navy, semantic tokens via OKLCH CSS variables), custom shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing CampusVoice AI, a full-stack campus complaint management system with React/Express/SQLite/Gemini AI, documenting architecture, existing features, known issues, and image requirements.
